hypothesis: When the total experimental time is fixed at 7200 s in ALP configuration III, deploying four parallel LLM agents with randomized model temperatures and shuffled precursor orderings and aggregating their conclusions via a simple summarizer will increase the probability of jointly discovering and correctly distinguishing both self-limiting ALD (B–C) and ALE (A–C) cycles from approximately 33% for a single-agent run to at least 75% without any additional domain hints.
